prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 电子科技大学为 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜 2026 年排名第 33 位（近年稳定在 28–33 名），属于全国顶尖理工类高校，信息与通信工程、电子科学与技术均为 A+ 学科，对高分考生吸引力强；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面（涉及学生困难认定事件及师德师风问题），但抖音热度排名第 33 位（较热），视频数 27 条，综合热度 134 万，整体曝光度较高；2022 年曾出现断档关注但影响有限，未出现持续负面冲击；电子科学与技术 A+、信息与通信工程 A+、计算机科学与技术 A、仪器科学与技术 A-、光学工程 A-、管理科学与工程 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，其中 A+ 学科 2 个，学科实力突出，对电子信息类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业持续高热推荐（2024 年 ），电气工程及其自动化高热推荐（74.28），与电子科大优势专业高度契合；重庆 2026 年普通高考总人数 209000 人（较 2025 年物理类 139478 人+历史类 73373 人=212851 人略有减少），竞争压力基本持平；电子科技大学位于四川成都，与重庆相邻，属于西南地区核心高校，对重庆考生具有天然地 域吸引力；该校在重庆招生占比约 2.5%（2025 年），属正常外省招生比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2021–2025 年位次持续前移趋势、2026 年物理类缩招约 10.2% 加剧竞争、学校层次与优势学科对高分考生的强吸引力、计算机/电子信息类专业持续高热等因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次将在 2025 年 1994 名基础上进一步前移。预测最低位次约 1920 名，区间 1820–2020 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of UESTC in Chongqing Physics Category were 2816→2751→2609→2258→1994, showing a continuous forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past 3 years, the cumulative forward movement is about 615 places, with a baseline of approximately 1994 in 2025, indicating the university's increasing competitiveness among Chongqing Physics Category candidates. From 2021 to 2025, the Physics Category enrollment plans were 154→137→133→138→127, showing an overall decreasing trend. In 2026, the plan is 114 students, a decrease of 13 students compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 10.2%). This reduction will intensify competition and push rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: UESTC is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it ranks 33rd (stable between 28-33 in recent years), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China. Its Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology are both A+ disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving student hardship identification incidents and teacher ethics issues), but its Douyin popularity ranks 33rd (relatively hot), with 27 videos and a comprehensive popularity of 1.34 million, indicating high overall exposure. In 2022, there was a brief attention due to a gap but with limited impact, and no sustained negative effects. It has 6 A- or above disciplines: Electronic Science and Technology A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Instrument Science and Technology A-, Optical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-, including 2 A+ disciplines, showcasing outstanding disciplinary strength and strong appeal to candidates in electronic information fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication majors continue to be highly recommended (2024), and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended (74.28), highly aligned with UESTC's advantageous majors. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Chongqing General College Entrance Examination is 209,000 (slightly decreased from 212,851 in 2025, which included 139,478 Physics Category and 73,373 History Category), so competition pressure is roughly stable. UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, adjacent to Chongqing, and is a core university in the Southwest region, naturally attractive to Chongqing candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), which is a normal out-of-province enrollment ratio.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in rankings from 2021 to 2025, the approximately 10.2% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 intensifying competition, the strong appeal of the university's level and advantageous disciplines to high-scoring candidates, and the sustained high popularity of Computer/Electronic Information majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will further advance from the 2025 baseline of 1994. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1920, with a range of 1820-2020.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1820-2020, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, use Tier 1 majors as a reach (requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range), and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. UESTC's core strengths are in Electronic Information and Computer Science, so it is recommended to prioritize major directions directly related to A+ disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the History Category of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Chongqing were 1462 → 1439 → 1871 → 1760 → 1649, with significant fluctuations. After a notable backward shift in 2023, the rankings have gradually moved forward in the past two years, with a baseline of approximately 1649 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the History Category was 10 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 13 in 2025, and remains at 13 in 2026. The plan is stable, with limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science Rankings. However, UESTC is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with limited majors in the History Category (only Foreign Language and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class, etc.), making it relatively less attractive to liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative (involving student hardship identification incidents and teacher ethics issues), but it has high popularity on Douyin (ranked 33rd), with overall high attention. UESTC's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in electronic information, computer science, and other science and engineering fields. The History Category majors (Foreign Language and Literature, Social Sciences) lack directly corresponding A-level discipline support, resulting in weak disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Foreign Language and Literature is generally wait-and-see (2024), while Law shows differentiated wait-and-see (63.54), with overall stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Chongqing is 209,000, with an estimated 71,000 in the History Category based on the recent proportion of about 34%, a slight decrease from 73,373 in 2025, resulting in basically stable competition pressure. UESTC is located in Chengdu, which has some regional appeal for liberal arts examinees in Chongqing, but the narrow selection of liberal arts majors limits application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight forward trend in rankings in recent years, the stable enrollment plan in 2026, limited liberal arts major options, and lack of strong disciplinary support, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 1649. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1690, with a range of 1600–1780.

- English (Language Cognition and International Communication)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: UESTC has few History Category majors in Chongqing (only 3). Within the predicted ranking range of 1600–1780, it is recommended to focus on the Social Science Experimental Class and English major as primary application directions. Due to the limited selection of liberal arts majors, examinees should carefully choose based on their interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for electronic science and technology university in Chongqing medical category (clinical medicine) over the past five years are: 2021: 15502, 2022: 5792, 2023: 4755, 2024: 4248, 2025: 5983. In terms of enrollment plan, 2021: 12 students, 2022: 14 students, 2023-2025: 11 students each year, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains 11 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction impact. From the ranking trend, it showed a continuous upward trend from 2021 to 2024 (ranking rose from 15502 to 4248), but in 2025 there was a significant drop to 5983, a large fluctuation. The 2026 plan is unchanged, and supply-demand elasticity calculation shows no ranking adjustment pressure due to plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed as a national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. The school focuses on electronic information science and technology, with outstanding engineering strength. Although the medical discipline started relatively late, relying on the school's strong engineering background and interdisciplinary advantages, the clinical medicine major has developed rapidly, and social recognition has increased year by year.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors, especially clinical medicine, continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide. University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only recruits one medical major (clinical medicine) in Chongqing, with a small enrollment scale (about 11 students per year), making competition relatively intense. As an important city in Southwest China, Chongqing candidates have high recognition of medical majors in local and surrounding 985 universities, but the significant drop in rankings in 2025 also reflects some volatility in application popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on supply-demand elasticity calculation and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for University of Electronic Science and Technology of China in Chongqing medical category in 2026 is approximately 5833, with a fluctuation range of 5658 to 6008. After the significant decline in rankings in 2025, there is expected to be a slight rebound in 2026, but it is difficult to return to the high of 4248 in 2024, and it is expected to oscillate around 5800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Shahe Campus)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China only recruits one major (clinical medicine) in the medical category in Chongqing, with no tier gradient. Candidates within the predicted ranking range can actively apply, and it is recommended to target clinical medicine as the major.
